name: openclaude-mcp
description: MCP control plane for OpenClaude — run the Claude Code harness (from the March 2026 leak) against local Ollama models. Zero cloud token cost. KAIROS autoDream memory consolidation. ULTRAPLAN cloud relay. FastMCP 3.2.

session_management.description: Start, monitor, prompt, and stop OpenClaude coding sessions

model_routing.description: Switch between Ollama models per session with VRAM/speed metadata

kairos.description: KAIROS autoDream background daemon — LLM memory consolidation when idle

ultraplan.description: Offload complex planning to Anthropic Opus, execute locally. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

prefab_ui.description: FastMCPApp fleet dashboard via Prefab UI. Requires fastmcp[apps] extra.

rest_bridge.description: POST /tools/{name} REST endpoint alongside SSE transport for webapp integration
